item.prompt: Create 2 premium client-ready exhibition stand render concepts for ERA Bahrain. Keep them buildable, elegant, bright, and commercially realistic.

concepts.title: Concept 1
concepts.summary: Premium gallery-led direction with clear zoning and high client readability.
concepts.prompt:
Client: ERA Bahrain
Event: Eskan Bank Innovation Summit 28 April
Location: Bahrain
Stand size: 6m x 6m (36 sqm)
Stand type: Island / Semi-open
Open sides / access: Open from 3 sides
Semi-open wall details: 4th side partially open with semi-open wall
Brand name: ERA Bahrain
Brand colors: Gold and white
Screen requirements: 2 x 65 inch vertical touch screens in center with ERA logo signage above, plus 1 touch screen at entrance
Reception requirements: Main entrance reception counter with hidden storage and coffee snacks section
Project model display: 3 project models total, main model in center with spotlight, 2 side display tables
Flooring: Parquet flooring
Accessibility: Small accessibility ramp for people with disabilities
Discussion / meeting areas: 6 to 8 discussion points, each with small table and maximum 3 chairs
VIP area: Dedicated VIP seating zone with client-provided sofa seating, coffee table, coffee machine table
Avoid: No dark mood, no double deck, no retail shelving, no hanging truss
Extra notes: Premium real estate / modern property gallery design direction

Create 2 premium client-ready exhibition stand render concepts for ERA Bahrain. Keep them buildable, elegant, bright, and commercially realistic.
